headline: Off-Duty Firefighter Rescues Three Trapped Children
meta_description: An off-duty Texas firefighter repeatedly dived beneath a capsized boat to rescue three trapped children, successfully reviving two with CPR. All three survived.
summary_short: Quick thinking and courage saved three young lives when a firefighter on holiday risked himself to pull children from a submerged boat.
body:
What began as a Fourth of July celebration for one Texas firefighter became a moment of heroic action. While spending time with his daughter, he witnessed a boat capsize with three children trapped beneath it. Without hesitation, the off-duty firefighter repeatedly dived under the vessel to reach them.

His training and determination made the difference between tragedy and survival. Two of the children required CPR after being pulled from the water, and the firefighter's knowledge of life-saving techniques brought them back. All three children survived the incident.

The story reflects both the readiness of those trained to help and the split-second decisions that can save lives. His willingness to act—even while off duty, even while with his own family—demonstrates the character that draws people to professions centered on protecting others.
